subject: ONBOARDING COMPLETE - SwarmMind lane status report
body:
LANE: swarmmind
POSITION: 2
AUTHORITY: 80
ROLE: trace-mediated-verification-surface
WORKING_DIR: S:/SwarmMind Self-Optimizing Multi-Agent AI System
TOOLS: [read, write, edit, bash, glob, grep, task, webfetch, question, todowrite]
AGENTS_MD: CONFIRMED
INBOX: 2 messages received, 2 processed (moved to processed/)
STATUS: READY

## Onboarding Test Results

1. CAN FIND INBOX: YES (with caveat - messages were in Archivist-Agent repo at S:/Archivist-Agent/lanes/swarmmind/inbox/, not in SwarmMind's own repo. Had to cross-repo read. Copied to local inbox for protocol compliance.)
2. KNOW IDENTITY: YES - opencode, lane position 2, authority 80, role: trace-mediated-verification-surface, can_govern: false
3. READ AGENTS.md: YES - 113 lines, confirmed lane-relay protocol, git protocol, session modes
4. KNOW TOOLS: YES - read, write, edit, bash, glob, grep, task, webfetch, question, todowrite
5. CAN SEND RESPONSE: YES - writing to lanes/archivist/inbox/ now

## Issues Detected

- ROUTING BUG: Onboarding messages were written to Archivist-Agent's copy of lanes/swarmmind/inbox/ instead of SwarmMind's own repo. The protocol says each repo has all three directories, but messages for SwarmMind should be placed in SwarmMind's repo, not Archivist's. This is a cross-repo path confusion.
- SUGGESTION: When Archivist wants to message SwarmMind, write to S:/SwarmMind Self-Optimizing Multi-Agent AI System/lanes/swarmmind/inbox/ not S:/Archivist-Agent/lanes/swarmmind/inbox/

## Verification Checklist
- [x] inbox processed
- [x] outbox logged
- [x] no pending P0 items
